# Storm Kristin, Portugal, January 2026

## Setup

```{python imports}
from datetime import date

import polars as pl
from soa_weather.clean import clean_ghcn_daily_observations, filter_ghcn_quality_flags
from soa_weather.read import load_station_observations, pivot_observations
from soa_weather.utils import data_dir
```

```{python global variables}
DATA_DIR = data_dir()
DLY_SUBDIR = DATA_DIR / "ghcnd_all"

area_dict = {"north": 45.0, "west": -15.0, "south": 35.0, "east": 5.0}
date_start = date(2026, 1, 25)
date_end = date(2026, 1, 31)
```

## Station Metadata

```{python read stations}
station_df = pl.read_csv(
    source=DATA_DIR / "stations_output.csv", infer_schema_length=1_000_000
)  # exported by scripts/read_ghcn_daily.py
```

```{python filter stations}
filtered_stations = station_df.filter(
    (pl.col("latitude") >= area_dict["south"])
    & (pl.col("latitude") <= area_dict["north"])
    & (pl.col("longitude") >= area_dict["west"])
    & (pl.col("longitude") <= area_dict["east"])
)
station_ids = filtered_stations["station_id"].to_list()
filtered_stations
```

## Observations

```{python load observations}
obs = load_station_observations(station_ids, DLY_SUBDIR)
obs
```

```{python clean observations}
obs = filter_ghcn_quality_flags(obs)
obs = clean_ghcn_daily_observations(obs, system="metric")
obs
```

## Precipitation (wide format)

```{python pivot precipitation}
prcp_wide = pivot_observations(
    obs,
    element="PRCP",
    date_start=date_start,
    date_end=date_end,
    completeness_threshold=0.9,
)
prcp_wide
```

## Temperature (wide format)

```{python pivot tmax}
tmax_wide = pivot_observations(
    obs,
    element="TMAX",
    date_start=date_start,
    date_end=date_end,
    completeness_threshold=0.9,
)
tmax_wide
```
